skills.name: Action Converter
skills.description: 5 concrete real-life actions for today, leverage-scored against open loops with specificity and anti-fluff gates

skills.name: Agent Buzz
skills.description: Curated AI-agent tweets, clustered into narratives with insight summaries

skills.name: AI Framework Watch
skills.description: Weekly competitive-intelligence digest on the AI agent framework space — momentum, releases, breaking changes across a curated 9-framework watchlist

skills.name: AIXBT Pulse
skills.description: Cross-domain market pulse from AIXBT's free grounding endpoint — crypto, macro, tradfi, geopolitics. Refreshes taxonomy references (clusters, chains) as a bonus.

skills.name: Daily Article
skills.description: Research trending topics and write a publication-ready article

skills.name: Auto Merge
skills.description: Automatically merge open PRs that have passing CI, no blocking reviews, and no conflicts

skills.name: Auto-Workflow Builder
skills.description: Analyze a URL and generate a tailored aeon.yml schedule with skill suggestions

skills.name: Autoresearch
skills.description: Evolve a skill by generating variations, evaluating them, and updating the best version

skills.name: Changelog
skills.description: Generate a user-facing weekly changelog (Keep a Changelog format) from recent commits across watched repos

skills.name: Channel Recap
skills.description: Weekly recap article from a public Telegram channel — rank posts by engagement, expand on the best

skills.name: Code Health
skills.description: Weekly report on TODOs, dead code, and test coverage gaps

skills.name: contributor-reward
skills.description: Closes the contributor flywheel — turns the weekly fork-contributor-leaderboard ranking into a tier-priced rewards plan, writes it into memory/distributions.yml, and hands off to distribute-tokens for the actual on-chain send

skills.name: contributor-spotlight
skills.description: Weekly recognition post for one fork operator — converts fork-cohort cohort data into a named human moment (POWER fork callout with their work, stars, and skills enabled). 4-week dedup; rotates across the cohort.

skills.name: cost-report
skills.description: Weekly API cost report — computes dollar costs from token usage, flags anomalies, forecasts burn, and prescribes concrete optimizations

skills.name: Create Campaign
skills.description: Provision Meta campaigns and ad sets on AdManage.ai from a declarative config. Runs on-demand — creates entities PAUSED, writes the returned IDs back into state so schedule-ads can launch into them.

skills.name: Create Skill
skills.description: Generate a complete new skill from a one-line prompt and ship it as a PR

skills.name: Daily Routine
skills.description: Morning briefing combining token movers, tweet roundup, paper pick, GitHub issues, and HN digest

skills.name: Deal Flow
skills.description: Weekly funding round tracker across configurable verticals

skills.name: Deep Research
skills.description: Exhaustive multi-source synthesis on any topic with explicit source credibility tiering and per-finding confidence — analyst-grade, not aggregator-grade

skills.name: DeFi Monitor
skills.description: Check pool health, positions, and yield rates for tracked protocols

skills.name: DeFi Overview
skills.description: Daily DeFi read — regime verdict, biggest movers with "why it matters", sustainable vs incentive yields, fees fundamentals

skills.name: Deploy Prototype
skills.description: Generate a small app or tool and deploy it live to Vercel via API

skills.name: Daily Digest
skills.description: Generate and send a daily digest on a configurable topic

skills.name: Distribute Tokens
skills.description: Send tokens to a list of contributors via Bankr Wallet API with per-recipient idempotency, two-phase resolve→execute, dry-run, and recovery from partial runs

skills.name: Evening Recap
skills.description: End-of-day operational summary — what Aeon shipped, what failed, what needs follow-up

skills.name: External Feature
skills.description: Proactively enhance watched repos — fix issues, add features, improve code

skills.name: Farcaster Digest
skills.description: Clustered, signal-scored digest of Farcaster casts with conversation-shape lead and insight-first editorial notes

skills.name: Fetch Tweets
skills.description: Search X/Twitter for tweets about a token, keyword, username, or topic — clustered by sub-narrative

skills.name: Fleet Control
skills.description: Monitor managed Aeon instances — check health, dispatch skills, aggregate status

skills.name: fleet-state
skills.description: Weekly fleet-state digest — synthesises fork-cohort + fork-release-tracker + contributor-spotlight into one Monday-morning "state of the fleet" narrative with WoW deltas and a 12-week trend

skills.name: fork-cohort
skills.description: Weekly fork-activation cohort tracker — buckets every fork by recent run activity (COLD / STALE / ACTIVE / POWER) with week-over-week deltas

skills.name: fork-release-tracker
skills.description: Weekly scan — celebrate when any fork of the parent repo cuts a tagged GitHub release. Silent when no fork releases in the window.

skills.name: fork-contributor-leaderboard
skills.description: Weekly ranking of developers contributing to the fork fleet and back upstream

skills.name: fork-fleet
skills.description: Inventory active Aeon forks, detect diverged work, surface upstream contribution candidates

skills.name: fork-skill-digest
skills.description: Weekly cross-fork customization digest — surfaces where the fleet's enable/disable/var/model decisions diverge from upstream defaults

skills.name: GitHub Issues
skills.description: Daily digest of new open issues across your repos, ranked by signal (security/bug/feature/other)

skills.name: GitHub Monitor
skills.description: Watch repos for stale PRs, new issues, and new releases — tiered by urgency with concrete next actions

skills.name: GitHub Releases
skills.description: Upgrade-triage digest of new releases across watched AI/infra/crypto repos

skills.name: GitHub Trending
skills.description: Curated trending GitHub repos — clustered, filtered, and labeled by momentum

skills.name: Goal Tracker
skills.description: Compare current progress against goals with quantified status, velocity, trend, and a concrete next action per goal

skills.name: Hacker News Digest
skills.description: Top HN stories filtered by interests, with comment-mined insights and themed clustering

skills.name: Heartbeat
skills.description: Proactive ambient check — surface anything worth attention

skills.name: Hugging Face Trending
skills.description: Curated trending Hugging Face models, datasets, and spaces — filtered, clustered, and labeled with a "why notable" line per pick

skills.name: Idea Capture
skills.description: Quick note capture triggered via Telegram — restates, triages, logs, and echoes back for confirmation

skills.name: Issue Triage
skills.description: Decision-ready triage — classify, dedupe, and emit a verdict + next action per new GitHub issue

skills.name: Last 30 Days
skills.description: Cross-platform social research — narrative-first intelligence on what people are saying about a topic across Reddit, X, HN, Polymarket, and the web over the last 30 days

skills.name: List Digest
skills.description: Cross-list narrative resonance + signal-scored top tweets from tracked X lists in the past 24 hours

skills.name: Market Context Refresh
skills.description: Fetch live crypto macro data and update memory/topics/market-context.md

skills.name: Monitor Kalshi
skills.description: Monitor specific Kalshi prediction markets for 24h price moves, volume changes, and top events

skills.name: Monitor Polymarket
skills.description: Monitor specific prediction markets for 24h price moves, volume changes, and fresh comments

skills.name: Monitor Runners
skills.description: Find the top 5 tokens that ran hardest in the past 24h across major chains using GeckoTerminal

skills.name: Morning Brief
skills.description: Priority-driven daily briefing — the 3 things to focus on today, why now, and what moved

skills.name: Narrative Tracker
skills.description: Track rising, peaking, and fading crypto/tech narratives with quantitative mindshare + velocity signals and explicit positioning calls

skills.name: On-Chain Monitor
skills.description: Monitor blockchain addresses and contracts for notable activity

skills.name: onboard
skills.description: One-shot setup validator — runs every check from the ./onboard CLI inside the workflow and sends the resulting checklist to the configured notification channel

skills.name: operator-scorecard
skills.description: Weekly plain-language synthesis of agent health + community growth + economic activity — answers "was this week worth it?" in one notification

skills.name: Paper Digest
skills.description: Find and summarize new papers matching tracked research interests

skills.name: Paper Pick
skills.description: Find the one paper you should read today from Hugging Face Papers

skills.name: Polymarket Comments
skills.description: Top trending Polymarket markets and the most interesting comments from them

skills.name: Price Threshold Alert
skills.description: Fire when the tracked token does something — new ATH, sharp 1h move, or operator-set target crossed. Silent on normal days.

skills.name: PR Review
skills.description: Auto-review open PRs with severity-tagged findings, inline comments, and a one-line verdict

skills.name: PR Triage
skills.description: First-touch triage for external pull requests — verdict + label + welcoming comment within minutes of open

skills.name: project-lens
skills.description: Write an article about the project through a surprising lens — connecting it to current events, trends, philosophy, or comparable projects

skills.name: push-recap
skills.description: Daily deep-dive recap of all pushes — reads diffs, ranks impact, separates user-visible shipments from internal work, delivers a verdict

skills.name: Reddit Digest
skills.description: Detect cross-subreddit narratives — stories surfacing in multiple unrelated subs at once

skills.name: Weekly Reflect
skills.description: Review recent activity, consolidate memory, and prune stale entries

skills.name: Refresh X
skills.description: Fetch a tracked X/Twitter account's latest tweets, cluster them, and save a decision-ready gist to memory

skills.name: Regulatory Monitor
skills.description: Track legislation, regulatory actions, and legal developments affecting prediction markets, crypto, and AI agents — triaged by stage × impact for decision-ready output

skills.name: Remix Tweets
skills.description: Fetch ~30 older tweets, pre-filter for remixability, then produce 10 new rephrased versions across diverse strategies with post-write quality gates

skills.name: Reply Maker
skills.description: Generate two reply options for 5 tweets from tracked X accounts or topics

skills.name: repo-actions
skills.description: Generate 5 anchored, implementable action ideas for a watched repo — specificity-gated, priority-ranked, with a Top Pick verdict

skills.name: repo-article
skills.description: Thesis-driven article about a watched repo — falsifiable claim, cited evidence, self-edit quality gate

skills.name: repo-pulse
skills.description: Daily report on new stars, forks, and releases for watched repos — with notable-stargazer enrichment and a one-line growth verdict

skills.name: Repo Scanner
skills.description: Catalog GitHub repos into a prioritized fleet report with concrete, coded opportunities that downstream skills consume directly

skills.name: Research Brief
skills.description: Deep dive on a topic with a falsifiable thesis, cited claims, and explicit uncertainty

skills.name: RSS Digest
skills.description: Fetch, summarize, and deliver RSS feed highlights

skills.name: RSS Feed Generator
skills.description: Generate an Atom XML feed from articles, validate it, and notify only when it actually changes

skills.name: Schedule Ads
skills.description: Schedule paid ads across Meta/TikTok/Snapchat/Pinterest/LinkedIn via the AdManage.ai API, driven by a declarative config file. Launches PAUSED by default — never auto-activates live spend.

skills.name: Search Skills
skills.description: Search the open agent skills ecosystem for skills that fill a real gap and install them via the native add-skill path

skills.name: Security Digest
skills.description: Lead with confirmed exploitation (CISA KEV), enrich with EPSS, filter GitHub Advisories to your tracked stack, output one action per item

skills.name: self-improve
skills.description: Improve the agent itself — better skills, prompts, workflows, and config based on recent performance

skills.name: show-hn-draft
skills.description: Draft a Show HN post (plus shorter Reddit r/MachineLearning + r/selfhosted variants) from the live repo state — README, SHOWCASE, recent repo-articles + project-lens, real autonomous behavior examples from logs, and current stars/forks/skill counts. Operator pastes; agent writes.

skills.name: skill-analytics
skills.description: Weekly fleet-level skill-run analytics — ranks skills by 7d run count, surfaces success rates, exit-taxonomy distribution, and anomaly flags (significance-gated)

skills.name: Skill Evals
skills.description: Validate skill outputs against assertions, diff vs prior eval to flag regressions, file issues for new failures, and queue concrete fixes

skills.name: skill-freshness
skills.description: Audit every enabled skill's upstream file dependencies for staleness — flags chained skills about to consume yesterday's article or a long-dead topic file

skills.name: Skill Dependency Graph
skills.description: Generate a navigable Mermaid dependency map of all skills with change detection, per-category drill-downs, and enabled overlay

skills.name: Skill Health
skills.description: Audit skill metrics, file/resolve issues in memory/issues/, and notify on state change only

skills.name: skill-leaderboard
skills.description: Weekly ranking of which skills are most popular across CONFIGURED Aeon forks (excludes untouched templates)

skills.name: Skill Repair
skills.description: Diagnose and fix failing or degraded skills automatically — systemic-first triage, per-category playbooks, verification plan

skills.name: Skill Security Scan
skills.description: Audit skills, workflows, and companion scripts for injection, exfiltration, traversal, and prompt-override risks with delta tracking, baseline suppression, issue filing, and per-finding remediation

skills.name: skill-update-check
skills.description: Check imported skills for upstream changes and security regressions since the version in skills.lock

skills.name: smithery-manifest
skills.description: Auto-generate Smithery + MCP Registry submission docs from skills.json and the aeon-mcp server — turns the 6-week-stuck "submit Aeon to Smithery" idea into a copy-paste form

skills.name: Spawn Instance
skills.description: Clone this Aeon agent into a new GitHub repo — fork, configure skills, validate, register in fleet

skills.name: star-milestone
skills.description: Announces when a watched repo crosses a star-count milestone (100, 150, 200, 250, 500, 1000, ...) with a velocity-shaped narrative — time-to-milestone, growth shape, projection, and a tight highlight reel

skills.name: star-momentum-alert
skills.description: Project the date a watched repo crosses its next star milestone — alert only when projected date lands inside the Show HN dispatch window (7-14 days out, Tue/Wed/Thu)

skills.name: Startup Idea
skills.description: 2 evidence-backed startup memos with ICP, wedge, monetization, and numeric kill criteria

skills.name: syndicate-article
skills.description: Cross-post articles to Dev.to and Farcaster with hook-driven copy and click-optimized metadata

skills.name: Technical Explainer
skills.description: Generate a visual technical explanation of a recent topic using Replicate for the hero image

skills.name: Telegram Digest
skills.description: Cross-channel digest of public Telegram posts — ranked by signal, clustered by narrative, not by channel

skills.name: Thread Formatter
skills.description: Score the day's events from memory/logs and format the top one as a 5-tweet thread ready to paste

skills.name: Token Alert
skills.description: Notify on price or volume anomalies for tracked tokens

skills.name: Token Movers
skills.description: Top movers, losers, and trending coins from CoinGecko — with signal enrichment and pump-risk flags

skills.name: Token Pick
skills.description: One token recommendation and one prediction market pick — scored, quantified, with a skip branch when signals are weak

skills.name: token-report
skills.description: Daily price performance report for the project's token — price, volume, liquidity, and context

skills.name: Tool Builder
skills.description: Build automation scripts from action-converter suggestions and recurring manual tasks

skills.name: Treasury Info
skills.description: Decision-ready treasury overview — verdict, concentration, depegs, significant changes

skills.name: Tweet Roundup
skills.description: Gist of the latest tweets on configurable topics

skills.name: Unlock Monitor
skills.description: Weekly token unlock and vesting tracker — quantify supply pressure via absorption ratio, classify cliff vs linear, deliver one-line market reads

skills.name: Update Gallery
skills.description: Publish new or changed articles to the GitHub Pages gallery with change detection, silent on no-op weeks

skills.name: v4-readiness
skills.description: Generate a per-fork v4 upgrade readiness checklist — reads the fork's aeon.yml, skills.json, and MEMORY.md, cross-references against the embedded v4 change manifest, emits Safe / Review / Custom / Action-items breakdown

skills.name: Vercel Projects
skills.description: Triage Vercel deploy fleet — verdict, errored-first, what-changed since last snapshot

skills.name: Vibecoding Digest
skills.description: Decision-ready pulse of r/vibecoding — ranked by signal score, narrative-clustered, with a one-line verdict and tools leaderboard

skills.name: Vuln Scanner
skills.description: Audit trending repos for real security vulnerabilities and disclose responsibly via PVR or dependency PRs

skills.name: Weekly Review
skills.description: KALM retrospective grounded in objective metrics, with closed-loop tracking of last week's actions and SMART next-week actions

skills.name: weekly-shiplog
skills.description: Weekly narrative of everything shipped — features, fixes, and momentum, written as a compelling update

skills.name: workflow-security-audit
skills.description: Audit .github/workflows and composite actions with zizmor + actionlint, classify findings against the prior audit, auto-fix Critical/High regressions, and open a PR only when something actually changed.

skills.name: Write Tweet
skills.description: Generate 10 tweet drafts across 5 size tiers (2 variations each) on a topic from today's outputs
